snippets.snippet: I love this hotel so much, the room is new and modern.
Great hotel, lovely staff, great price and perfect position

snippets.snippet: I paid for a 2 star hotel and got a 5 star experience.
Smart TV, bed is King Koil certified, wifi speed is strong ,
Great location, friendly staff and value for money
Bakal jadi pilihan utk stay klu ke Banda Aceh lg
Our two-night stay with our kids was extremely comfortable.
The rooms are quite spacious, looks stylish and up to date.
Everything is good! Love the bed and the water pressure.
Newly renovated hotel, nice clean room and bathroom
Newly renovated hotel, nice clean room and bathroom,.
Very nice, newly renovated hotel, best in Aceh
Akn dtg, kalau ke Acheh lagi.. pasti pilih hotel ni
Clean and room in great condition, came with A&W breakfast.
Bagus, ga disangka banget kamarnya bagus..rapi
Super nice helpful staff, clean room, comfortable bed.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top rated room amenities
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Room amenities include King Koil mattresses, smart TVs with Netflix/YouTube, hairdryers, kettles, mini-fridges and safes in many rooms

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Comfortable mattresses
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: King Koil beds receive frequent praise for comfort and sleep quality

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Ideal location
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Central, city-center location within walking distance of Masjid Baiturrahman, Museum Tsunami, A&W, HokBen, Pizza Hut, supermarkets and many eateries

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Rooms are consistently described as clean, modern and well maintained across many stays

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Many guests describe the hotel as good value for money, noting affordable rates with decent facilities and services

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. As an added bonus, restaurant is provided on-site to conveniently serve your needs.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 2 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very good hotel, there is an A&W restaurant downstairs, spacious room, cool air conditioning, large bathroom, close to other restaurants and shops.. Recommended
comments.originalComment: Hotel yang sangat baik, di bawah ada restoran A&W, bilik luas, aircond sejuk, bilik air luas, berdekatan dengan restoran dan toko lain.. Recomended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I stayed for 3 days and 2 nights, from April 22 to 24, 2026. The place is clean, the staff is friendly, the lights are bright, the bed is large, and it is close to souvenir shops. The location is strategic.

Recommended.
comments.originalComment:
Saya menginap 3D2N, tg 22-24 April 2026,
Tempat bersih, staff ramah, lampunya terang, bed nya besar, dekat dengan tempat oleh2. Lokasi strategis.

Recommended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I stayed alone as a woman. The location is very good, and I can walk to famous restaurants and streets lined with food stalls. The room is also clean, and there is a hairdryer provided. They also gave me two bottles of water. The towels are clean as well. They treated me kindly even though I can't speak English or Indonesian.
comments.originalComment: 女1人で泊まりました。立地がとてもよく、歩いて有名なご飯屋さんや屋台が並ぶ場所に行けます。部屋も綺麗でドライヤーも設置してあります。お水も2本くださいました。タオルも綺麗です。英語もインドネシア語も話せない私にも優しく接してくださいました。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room was spacious and clean. A&W breakfast was good. The staff were friendly and helpful, enhancing the overall experience. The location was also ideal
comments.reviewTitle: Great stay with minor facility flaws

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The location is in the city center, cleanliness is excellent unlike in Medan, the water pressure is strong, the wifi is great, and sahur is delivered right on time as requested. I will subscribe whenever I go to Banda Aceh.
comments.originalComment: Lokasi berada di pusat kota, kebersihan juara gak spt yg di Mdn, air kenceng, wifi mantap, sahur diantar tepat sesuai permintaan. Langganan klo sy ke Banda Aceh

recommendTexts: 370 customers had great experiences at this property
reviewCardPopup.title: {0}% of guests recommend this property, based on {1} reviews.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I visited Banda Aceh coincidentally when there was a Grand Opening of one of our branches, and I chose Hotel 61 where I had never stayed before. And yes, this hotel exceeded my expectations. I got room 2017 if I'm not mistaken. Upon entering, I found a room that was fragrant and very bright, quite spacious, with a comfortable bed and a clean bathroom. The water pressure was strong, and there were many TV channels. If I were to stick to one, it would be Hotel 61. Thank you.
comments.originalComment: saya mengunjungi Banda Aceh kebetulan pas ada Grand Opening salah satu cabang Gerai kami, dan saya memilih Hotel 61 dimana sebelumnya saya jg belum pernah menginap di hotel ini sebelumnya, dan yesss hotel ini di luar ekspetasi saya, saya dapat di kamar 2017 klo tidak salah, masuk ruangan mendapati kamar yang wangi, dan ruangan yg sangat terang, ruangan kamar cukup luas, tempat tidur yang nyaman dan kamar mandi yang bersih, airnya cukup kencang, channel TV banyak. klo saya pertahankan ya Hotel 61. terima kasih

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: i love this hotel so much, the room is new and modern. the toilet is clean and have stylish mirror with lamp. the room is simply complete. and nice location in the heart of shopping centre

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I paid for a 2 star hotel and got a 5 star experience. The room was so clean and nice. The staff were friendly and helpful. The location was great. I highly recommend staying here. It's amazing.
comments.originalComment: I paid for a 2 star hotel and got a 5 star experience. The room was so clean and nice. The staff were friendly and helpful. Location was great. I highly recommend staying here. Its amazing.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is quite comfortable, the King Koil bed supports a good rest. The location is in the city center, with many shops and restaurants around, which can be accessed by walking on the fairly tidy sidewalks. Breakfast at the AW restaurant (included) with a menu to choose from. Recommended.
comments.reviewTitle: A comfortable and quiet hotel in the city center.
comments.originalTitle: Hotel nyaman dan tenang di pusat kota
comments.originalComment: Kamar cukup nyaman, Bed King Koil mendukung istirahat yang baik. Lokasi di pusat kota, banyak pertokoan dan resto di sekitar nya, yang bisa terjangkau dengan akses jalan kaki  di trotoar yang cukup rapi. Breakfast di resto AW ( include) dengan menu yang bisa dipilih. Reccomended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I had a really pleasant stay here. The location is convenient for getting around, the rooms are clean, and the staff are friendly and helpful. Wi-Fi worked well, hot water was always available, and breakfast was a nice bonus to start the day. Overall, a comfortable and enjoyable stay with great value for money. I’d happily recommend it.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel room is very comfortable, the service is quick, the location is strategic in the city center, the accommodation price is very worth it, and the provided facilities are very complete. 👍🏻
comments.originalComment: Kamar hotelnya sangat nyaman, pelayanannya cepat, lokasi strategis di tengah kota, harga menginap sangat worth it dan fasilitas yang diberikan sangat lengkap👍🏻

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I have stayed here twice for a short vacation. The hotel is comfortable, clean, and the breakfast from AW is all delicious. We will be back again in two months. 👍🏻
comments.originalComment: sudah 2 kali nginap disini untuk liburan singkat. hotel nya nyaman, bersih, sarapan nya juga dari AW enak enak semua. kami akan kembali lagi 2 bulan kesini👍🏻

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Great Hotel, think they've just renew the Hotel. Location is great, nears anything you need.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is not big, but for sure is enough for us. Clean and comfortable. Breakfast is from A&W with different options.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room facilities feel like a 5-star, equipped with a balcony, Smart TV, and other amenities that are still like new. If there's a lack on the food side, it's because we chose the package from AW. Other than that, everything is very good, the best in its class.
comments.originalComment: Fasilitas kamar serasa bintang 5, memiliki balkon, Smart TV dan fasilitas lainnya masih seperti baru. Jika ada kurang disisi makanan karena memilih paket dari AW. Selebih nya sangat bagus dan terbaik di kelas nya.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The right choice to stay at this hotel, it's strategically located in the city center, the rooms are clean and comfortable, unfortunately, it doesn't have its own restaurant but is connected to AW.
comments.originalComment: Pilihan tepat menginap dihotel ini, tempatnya strategis di pusat kota, kamarnya bersih dan nyaman sayangnya tidak punya restoran sendiri tp gabung sm AW

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is super comfortable, it's suitable for traveling HERE, fragrant, the rooms are clean, the staff is very friendly, the breakfast is the best. Among all the hotels, this has become one of our favorite hotels.
comments.originalComment: Hotelnya super nyaman, kalau untuk berpergian cocok DISINI, harum., kamarnya bersih, stafnya ramah ramah sarapan paginya best., dari semua hotel ini menjadi salah satu favorit hotel kami

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments:
1. This hotel is close to several food centers, such as Razali noodles, Daud fried rice, Snow Mountain restaurant, Hokben, and Mixue as well.
2. This hotel is part of a fast-food chain, namely AW, so you don't need to worry about looking for food because it is open 24 hours.
3. Its strategic location is very close to Baiturrahman mosque, less than 15 minutes away.

This hotel is very worth it; besides that, the hotel's interior is clean and comfortable.
comments.originalComment:
1. Ini hotel dekat ke beberapa pusat makanan, seperti mie razali, nasi goreng daud, restoran gunung salju, hokben, mixue juga. 
2. Hotel ini merupakan bagian dari makanan cepat saji yaitu AW so gak perlu ribet kalau mau cari makan krna 24 jam buka ges.
3. Tempat nya yg strategis, ke mesjid Baiturrahman sangat dekat kurang dari 15 menit

Ini hotel sangat worth it sih, disamping itu juga interior hotel yg bersih, clean dan comfortable.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: newly renovated hotel, nice clean room and bathroom,. A&W below hotel. best in Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Location in the city center and close to the pride of the Acehnese community, the grand mosque. The room is clean and comfortable.
comments.originalComment: lokasi di pusat kota dan dekat dengan mesjid raya kebanggaan masyarakat Aceh. kamar bersih dan nyaman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Comfortable, clean, strategically located in the city center, an additional fragrance would enhance the impression of an already very good hotel.
comments.originalComment: Nyaman, bersih, lokasi strategis ditengah kota, tambahan boleh ada pewangi untuk lebih menambah kesan hotel yang sudah sangat oke

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We had a lovely surprise at this hotel! Our two-night stay with our kids was extremely comfortable. Nice touches included a welcome drink by the elevator and a delicious breakfast. While the staff were kind and helpful, a warmer smile would've made our stay perfect. A warm and genuine smile from the staff can go a long way in making guests feel welcome and valued. It's a simple yet powerful way to create a positive and inviting atmosphere. Overall, we'd definitely return to this hotel.
comments.originalComment: We had a lovely surprise at this hotel! Our two-night stay with our kids was extremely comfortable. Nice touches included a welcome drink by the elevator and a delicious breakfast. While the staff were kind and helpful, a warmer smile would've made our stay perfect. A warm and genuine smile from the staff can go a long way in making guests feel welcome and valued. It's a simple yet powerful way to create a positive and inviting atmosphere. Overall, we'd definitely return to this hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is in the center of Aceh. Much of food store surrounding the hotel. Though the price is cheap, but have too facilities. The room is very clean, spacious, complete amenities such as towel, toothbrush, hairdryer, and soap. The staff was very helpful & kind. The breakfast was great because it has partnership with fast-food brand, A&W, so you can choose from their menus. And they serve free-flow of water/orange juice. It was a very nice experience to stay there and absolutely will be stay again there if I came back to Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The staff and other teams were very helpful and solution-oriented. The room was cleaned every day. This is the second time I've stayed at Hotel 61 Banda Aceh every time I come to Aceh. Blessings to the Hotel 61 team. Thank you for 8 memorable days. See you again ❤️✨
comments.originalComment: Staff dan tim lainnya sangat membantu dan solutif. kamar dibersihkan setiap hari. sudah kedua kalinya setiap kali ke Aceh selalu menginap di Hotel 61 Banda Aceh. Berkah selalu tim Hotel 61. terima kasih 8 hari yang berkesan. sampai jumpa lagi yaa ❤️✨

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: My second time here, so far so good, clean and easy to go everywhere, food centre nearby, town area, will comeback again

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, very comfortable, and in a strategic location. There are many restaurants to eat within walking distance on both sides. The staff is friendly. I will definitely come back again! 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
comments.originalComment: Hotel bersih, sangat nyman , lokasi strategis .. jalan kaki kiri kanan banyak retoran untuk makan , staff ramah, aku bakal balik lagi 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel facilities are very satisfying, very family-friendly for those bringing their families, and the staff service is friendly.
comments.originalComment: Fasilitas hotel sangat memuaskan, family friendly banget buat yg bawa keluarga dan pelayanan staf ramah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is spacious and clean due to the new building... The breakfast menu has several package options. However, if staying for a long time, it should be considered because there is a possibility of getting bored with the breakfast menu.
comments.originalComment: Kamar luas dan bersih krn bangunan baru... Sarapan nya menu AW ada beberapa pilihan paket. Cuma kalo utk waktu yg lama hrs menjadi pertimbangan krn kemungkinan bosan dgn menu sarapannya

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Best banget lokasi di city center banyak kafe dan resto disekitar hotel. 
Kamar hotel bagus bersih bed nya paling top deh empuk nyaman bgttt, kamar mandi jg bagus bersih. Bakal jadi pilihan utk stay klu ke Banda Aceh lg
comments.reviewTitle: Best budget hotel in the heart of town

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Impressive.. I've stayed here twice. The hotel is clean with new and modern facilities, and the beds are comfortable.
comments.originalComment: Mengesankan.. sudah 2x nginap disini. Hotel bersih denga fasilitas yang batu dan terawal, kasur yg nyaman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: For a staycation, it's great with affordable prices, five-star room facilities, and breakfast is included.. hehe
comments.originalComment: Untuk staycation bagus sekali harga terjangkau kamar fasilitas bintang 5 sarapan AW lgi.. hihi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Clean and room in great condition, came with A&W breakfast. Within minutes to Banda Aceh Kartini Traditional Market. Room can be slightly noisy since is facing the Main Street.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This budget hotel in conveniently and strategically located and city center. Easy to find restaurants (they also provide complimentary breakfast A&W which is shared in same building). The room is very clean, big and complete with necessities . Their Staff also always happy to provide their assistant whenever required. Overall we have great experiences and highly recommended for those who is looking for budget hotels but comes with exceptional and pleasant stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Hotel 61 Banda Aceh is a clean and comfortable hotel with a very strategic location in the city center.
The rooms are cozy and affordable, and the staff are friendly and helpful.
Breakfast is simple because it is provided through A&W, but overall it is a good value for budget travelers.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The room was above the standard for the price you paid. The staff was helpful and allowed early check in, if able. 
A&W is just next door connected to the hotel. We had breakfast, and lunch there for the sake of convenience. 

One thing which I forgot to mention to the staff.  The drainage in the shower of room 214 was not flowing well. The bathroom was flooded after each shower in just 2 minutes. But, other than that all great and will definitely return.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel ternyaman yang pernah saya singgah, kamar mandi yang bersih, dan tempat tidur yang sangat nyaman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable and clean, but yesterday there was a leak in the air conditioning, but they fixed it right away. The staff is friendly. However, for breakfast, I recommend the delicious traditional Acehnese food.
comments.originalComment: Hotelnya nyaman, bersih, tpi kmren ada kejadian AC nya bocor, tpi langsung dibuatin. Untuk staf nya ramah. Tpi untuk breakfash rekom nya makanan khas aceh si enaknya

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: the iconic breakfast with junkfood style (AW chicken), clean room, nice shower presure👍🏼👍🏼

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Rooms are clean and modern look, with the King Koil bed makes it more comfy. Breakfast is A&W, so unique =)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is clean and wit spacious room for the three of us. Furnishings is in mint condition. Easy access to eatery place by walking distance. A good pitstop hotel for us to stay over before heading Weh Island

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Semuanya mantap, fasilitas kamar juga juara. Tv all channel ada, tempat tidur nyaman bgt, kamar mandi terasa megah hahaha. 
Paling penting bisa early checkin kalo kamar tersedia, dan bisa tanpa extrabed👌
Staffnya ramah" bgt, buat kak windi juara bgt pelayanannya, walau lagi cuti tapi tetap melayani sepenuh hati🫶
Ada lift, jadi gak perlu capek" naik tangga.
Lokasi bener" strategis, deket Mesjid Baiturrahman, dekat sama Museum Tsunami, dekat tempat makanan. Pokoknya bisa dijangkau dengan jalan kaki
Fasilitas kamarnya ada, ceret kettle, dua gelas, teh kopi gula, tv, brangkas, kulkas, ac, air mineral.
Fasilitas kamar mandinya ada shampoo, shower gel, sikat gigi, shower cap, hair dryer, cermin besar, cermin kecil, kedua cerminnya dilengkapi lampu.
Semua elektronik menyala dengan baik.
Tempat tidur menggunakan merk king koil, dan semua peralatan kamar mandi menggunakan merk toto.
Good job Hotel 61 Banda Aceh👌
InsyaAllah kalo ke Aceh lagi, bakalan nginep disini, terlebih dengan harga 300an👌

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This hotel has been closed for a long time and has reopened with a new and more modern look. The rooms are very comfortable and clean, and the staff is quite friendly. The hotel is located in the city center, close to tourist attractions, culinary centers, and easily accessible by transportation.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Everything's good, what to improve :
- no car parking except on the side road
- water jet for taking bath (kurang kencang air showernya)
- breakfast must be more variative

Thanks

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We book for family room, the room quite spacious, the bed very comfy as all their mattress used king koil. clean and modern bathroom, and friendly staff.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Stay for 1 night.. Really comfortable... Got room without window... Below hotel have fastfood chain group A&W... Breakfast provided by A&W

All facility in a room was good and value for money

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The rooms are very nice and clean. Modern look with King Koil bed which adding more comfy. Location perfect at the center and nearby to famous restaurants. And the breakfast is A&W, my childhood fastfood chain.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The hotel is small but fulfil need of traveler, especially business traveler.

Tidy look and feel, bright interior, clean and simple

Room has large TV with youtube, good lighting.

Legendary restaurant just in front of the hotel or 3 minutes walk. A&W restaurant and HokBen are 1 minute walk.

cons: book 2 room, 1 of the room do not have window.  Hotel should differentiate the price.

Good choice to stay in Banda Aceh
The included breakfast is A&W meal package, good deal!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewTitle: Hot water, but no vegetarian option for breakfast.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Hotel bersih
Dekat dgn Masjid Raya Baiturahman

Akn dtg, kalau ke Acheh lagi.. pasti pilih hotel ni

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The location is very close to business area and Baiturahman mosque, hotel facilities are very complete, smart TV, bed is King Koil certified, wifi speed is strong , breakfast with AW menu, near fastfood restaurant (HokBen & Pizza Hut) & finally the price is excellent...totally worth value of money...definitely will stay again when come back to Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
new hotel,
clean & spacious.
But… no pool ye, in agoda , they wrote with pool,
Anyway, enjoy shopping around hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Kamarnya ternyata jauh lebih luas dari yang saya bayangkan — benar-benar sebanding dengan harga yang dibayar.

Tempat tidurnya sangat nyaman, menggunakan kasur King Koil bersertifikat. Colokan listrik tersedia banyak, sangat memudahkan. Sarapan disediakan dalam bentuk kupon yang bisa digunakan di A&W.

Lokasinya strategis, dekat dengan Simpang Lima dan memiliki akses yang mudah ke berbagai destinasi wisata di Aceh, termasuk Masjid Raya.

Awalnya saya berencana menginap di hotel lain, tetapi akhirnya memutuskan untuk memperpanjang masa inap saya di hotel ini karena pengalaman yang sangat memuaskan.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Nice reasonably clean large room with modern fittings.Hotel reception is at the A&W Restaurant,serving breakfast every morning.Receptionists are friendly and helpful.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Stay for 3 nights with amazing experiences. Super nice helpful staff, clean room, comfortable bed. Would stay here again.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Good:
Clean, standard-sized hotel room with large, very comfortable bed.
Well-appointed bathroom. Large TV with Netflix and YouTube.
Located in friendly local neighbourhood with multiple food options and an excellent supermarket nearby.

Not so good:
The included breakfast is taken at the fast food chicken outlet on the ground floor of the hotel.
There can sometimes be the smell of fried chicken in the corridor and room.
Hot water in shower lasts about 2 minutes max. Weak WiFi.
comments.reviewTitle: Good night’s sleep; not so keen on breakfast

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Super modern and minimalist accommodation. 

Room: spacious,  bright and clean. 

Breakfast: If your breakfast is included in the room rate, the hotel will give you breakfast coupon that you can claim from the A&W fast food restaurant next door. 
I’m not a huge fan of fast food but some people might find it decent.

Location: very strategic depending on your purpose of travel.

Free coffee, tea, orange juice and water throughout the day during your stay.

Overall, it is a nice and pleasant place to stay.
comments.reviewTitle: Comfortable and Convenient place to stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Room is spacious and clean..We checked in after our trip to Pulau Sabang, during the Aceh flood. Power using generator ,  but overall a good experience. Hotel still new.  Triple room come with table for 2, a lot of power sockets provided too. Nothing to complain about.. Recomendes

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Anak suka sarapan di a&w. Lokasi juga berdekatan dengan tempat makan dan beli belah. Waktu malam kedai2 masih buka hingga 11 malam.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This is a hotel I would return to, and recommend for several day stay. It checks all requirements for comfortable day to day stay hotel. The bathroom is clean, in room facilities are satisfying (water kettle, mini fridge, safety box, lots of electric sockets, spacious tables), staffs are helful and friendly. It also hosts A&W restaurant on ground floor. Definitely a hotel you want to return to after exhausting trips arounnd the city. That being said, this is not a resort type hotel. So those seeking facilities such as spacious swimming pool, spas, etc should find it somewhere else
comments.reviewTitle: A better experience than its competitors

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The hotel was very nice, comfortable bed and modern design. The bathroom was exceptional, the highlight of the room. Clean, modern, with huge mirrors with lights. 

Unfortunately I got a room without windows, I would suggest to leave a note ahead if you prefer to have windows like me. 

One small thing thoug, there is a slight unpleasant smell (which I think came from the plumbing), though it does get better after I stayed in the room for a whole.
comments.reviewTitle: Great budget hotel for business travel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Everything is good! Love the bed and the water pressure. Its just that the toilet has the uncomfortable smell, probably from the pipe

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel bangunan baru, bersih, kamar lega, kasur nyaman, toilet juga bersih, bangunan baru gaya modern.. lokasi di pusat kota, dekat ke mana mana.. ke Masjid Baiturahman bisa jalan kaki.. utk breakfastnya kurang begitu cocok, karena bukan menu all you can eat.. kita jd pilih menu yg tersedia seperti chiken or burger di AW..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Keren sih. kamar kualitas bintang 4 dengan harga yg masuk akal. semua perabotan branded, modern, dan baru bahkan lengkap ada kulkas mini dan hair dryer. dapat sarapan A&W. awalnya ragu karena kayak hotel ruko. ternyata diluar expetasi. bakal balik lg nginap sini klo ke banda 👍
comments.reviewTitle: kamar kualitas bintang 4 dengan harga yg masuk akal

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I'd highly recommend this hotel due to its strategic location in the middle of the city. The rooms are quite spacious, looks stylish and up to date. Plus point is their breakfast is provided by A&W attached next to this hotel. I'll definitely book this hotel again when travel to Banda Aceh in future!
comments.reviewTitle: Strategic hotel location and comfort stay

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: The bedroom is very nice, the cleanliness in the bathroom still has an unpleasant smell from the drain, it should be given some fragrance. The bathroom door is a bit difficult to open wide, the sliding door is stuck. The price is quite competitive and recommended for the next stay, breakfast is okay for those who like AW.
comments.originalComment: Ruang tidur bagus sekali, kebersihan dikamar mandi masih ada bau kurang sedap dari lobang pembuangan air, agar diberi wewangian, pintu kamar mandi agak susah dibuka lebar, pintu sorongnya macat. Harga cukup bersaing dan rekomended nginap berikutnya, sarapan Ok bagi yg suka AW..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel's location is quite okay, close to the Great Mosque and shopping mall. The staff service is also good. However, the air conditioning is really poor. When I checked in, I noticed the cooling was average, and I asked the front desk for a room change, but the new room was the same, so I didn't bother to change again. I was awakened by the heat at four in the morning and found it cooler outside than in the room, so I stayed in the downstairs restaurant until morning. Friends who are not afraid of the heat can choose this place. Everything else is pretty good.
comments.reviewTitle: The air conditioning is not working well.
comments.originalComment: 酒店位置还是很OK的，离大清真寺和商场都很近。员工服务也不错。但是空调实在太烂了。入住时候就发现空调制冷很一般，要求前台给换一间房，发现换的房间还是一样，索性就没换。半夜四点就给我热醒了，发现大街上比房间还凉爽，一直楼下餐厅坐到清晨。不怕热的朋友可以选择这家。其他都还是不错的。

The ice cream shop directly across the street is very delicious, and there are many bakeries on the right side, each one is great and super tasty. The only downside is the poor soundproofing; at night, motorcycles often pass by.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The environment is very good, the bedding is very comfortable, there are many lights in the bathroom mirror and a makeup mirror, and the fridge and water heater are all complete. There are also many restaurants nearby, and there is an elevator.
comments.originalComment: 非常好环境床上用品睡的也很舒服，浴室的镜子很多灯光也有化妆镜，冰箱热水器一应俱全，附近餐厅也很多，有电梯。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
New refurbished hotel, very clean but basic facilities. Below, an A&W restaurant, very convenient instant food  available whenever desired.   
Location quite central in the middle of Banda Aceh to visit places of interest like the Tsunami Museum, Ulee Lheue for a cuppa coffee,  the beautiful Masjid Raya and Masjid BaiturRahim that survived the mighty 2004 tsunami, etc. A number of restaurants and shopping areas in the vicinity easily within walking distance. 
There are many inexpensive reflexology centres too nearby to rejuvenate your body after a day’s travelling 
Will definitely come back and stay  here again in the future.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Das Hotel war bei AGODA als 5 Sterne Hotel ausgewiesen und mit tollen Bilder zum ansehen. ABER!!!!!!!!!!!!
Das Hotel hat nur 3 Sterne und die Hälfte der Bilder waren und sind nicht von diesem Hotel!!!!!!!!!
Die Zimmer sind sehr schön wie auch das Hotel im Inneren. Leider gibt es keinen Frühstücksraum und nur ein einfaches Fast Food Restaurant in dem es nur 4 mögliche Menüs zum Frühstück gibt. Außerdem bekommt man nur eine Tasse Kaffee zum Frühstück. Die weiteren müssen separat bezahlt werden. Das alles kann auch die Freundlichkeit des Personals nicht mehr wett machen. Fazit: besser nicht !!!!!!! Ausladen geht an AGODA eine Beschwerde raus wegen der falschen Darstellung!!!!!

comments.reviewComments: 据说是华人老板，宾馆装修比照中国国内宾馆，但是地板会有点翘，室外有个阳台雨天漏雨，窗户不怎么隔音晚上有点吵（没窗户那间户型不吵但是有下水道味）。早餐超级好，就是楼下的炸鸡店，入住的时候会有几个套餐可以选，早上7点开始。周围有一家很好吃的面包店，人超多，咖喱包超级好吃只要10千一个，gelato和国内一个味但是要便宜一丢丢。

comments.reviewComments: Hotel yang sangat terbaik di Banda Aceh. hotel yang sangat bersih, interior yang aesthetic, nyaman, walaupun harganya  sangat terjangkau, kami mendapatkan kamar yang terbaik, sampai anak anak pun tidak mau pulang sangking nyaman dan menyenangkan hotelnya. saya dan suami beserta anak anak, akan kembali di minggu depan untuk menginap nya kembali dihotel ini. terimakasih.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 只有这个户型是无窗的，我们在有窗和无窗各住了一天。无窗这间电源线是乱拉的，开关乱七八糟的，会有下水道味道，但是一点都不吵，疲惫的时候睡觉很稳。整体是可以住的宾馆，这边要求就不要太高了。厕纸需要找前台领，我们一天没厕纸，另一天厕纸是泡水的。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 電力充沛，網路好、房間乾淨、樓下AW隔壁自助洗衣、滿足旅客一切，超棒！
